sites.name: 51视频(直连源)
sites.desc: 全网吃瓜爆料，自动嗅探播放

js.category: [{"text":"最新发布","id":"/"},{"text":"网红黑料","id":"/category/whhl/"},{"text":"吃瓜视频","id":"/category/cgsp/"},{"text":"社会猛料","id":"/category/shml/"}]
js.home: async (page, categoryId) => { const url = categoryId === '/' ? `https://51sptv.com/page/${page}/` : `https://51sptv.com${categoryId}page/${page}/`; const resp = await fetch(url); const html = await resp.text(); const items = []; const regex = /<article.*?href="(.*?)".*?title="(.*?)".*?data-src="(.*?)".*?<\/article>/gs; let match; while ((match = regex.exec(html)) !== null) { items.push({ id: match[1], title: match[2], cover: match[3], remark: '点击播放' }); } return items; }
js.search: async (keyword, page) => { const url = `https://51sptv.com/search/${encodeURIComponent(keyword)}/${page}/`; const resp = await fetch(url); const html = await resp.text(); const items = []; const regex = /<article.*?href="(.*?)".*?title="(.*?)".*?data-src="(.*?)".*?<\/article>/gs; let match; while ((match = regex.exec(html)) !== null) { items.push({ id: match[1], title: match[2], cover: match[3] }); } return items; }
js.detail: async (id) => { const resp = await fetch(id); const html = await resp.text(); const descMatch = html.match(/<meta name="description" content="(.*?)"/); return { id: id, title: '视频播放', desc: descMatch ? descMatch[1] : '', playlist: [{ text: '播放线路', urls: [{ text: '正片', id: id }] }] }; }
